ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subaccounts" (
  "subaccount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subaccount */,
  "subaccount_name" TEXT /* Name of the subaccount */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subaccount */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the subaccount was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the subaccount (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "market_value" REAL /* The current market value of the subaccount */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* The risk level associated with the subaccount (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* The type of investment (e.g., equity, bond, real estate) */,
  "asset_allocation" TEXT /* The asset allocation strategy for the subaccount */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time the subaccount details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subaccount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_types" (
  "performance_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance type */,
  "performance_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance type */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* The method used to calculate the performance (e.g., time-weighted return, money-weighted return) */,
  "benchmark" TEXT /* The benchmark against which the performance is measured (e.g., S&P 500, FTSE 100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "subaccount_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subaccount */,
  "performance_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance type */,
  "last_quarter" REAL /* Performance for the last quarter */,
  "year_to_date" REAL /* Performance for the year-to-date */,
  "one_year" REAL /* Performance for the last one year */,
  "three_years" REAL /* Performance for the last three years */,
  "five_years" REAL /* Performance for the last five years */,
  "ten_years" REAL /* Performance for the last ten years */,
  "life_of_subaccount" REAL /* Performance for the life of the subaccount */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date for the performance metric */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date for the performance metric */,
  "benchmark_performance" REAL /* The performance of the benchmark for the same period */,
  "alpha" REAL /* The alpha value, indicating the performance relative to the benchmark */,
  "beta" REAL /* The beta value, indicating the sensitivity to market movements */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* The Sharpe ratio, indicating the risk-adjusted return */,
  "treynor_ratio" REAL /* The Treynor ratio, indicating the excess return per unit of risk */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_subaccount_id FOREIGN KEY ("subaccount_id") REFERENCES subaccounts ("subaccount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_performance_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_type_id") REFERENCES performance_types ("performance_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optional_benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optional benefit */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the optional benefit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the optional benefit */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* The type of benefit (e.g., death benefit, living benefit) */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* The criteria for eligibility for the benefit */,
  "benefit_value" REAL /* The value of the benefit (e.g., percentage of investment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subaccount_benefits" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "subaccount_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subaccount */,
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optional benefit */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date for the benefit */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date for the benefit */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the benefit (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subaccount_benefits_subaccount_id FOREIGN KEY ("subaccount_id") REFERENCES subaccounts ("subaccount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subaccount_benefits_benefit_id FOREIGN KEY ("benefit_id") REFERENCES optional_benefits ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_benefits" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "subaccount_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subaccount */,
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optional benefit */,
  "performance_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance type */,
  "last_quarter" REAL /* Performance for the last quarter */,
  "year_to_date" REAL /* Performance for the year-to-date */,
  "one_year" REAL /* Performance for the last one year */,
  "three_years" REAL /* Performance for the last three years */,
  "five_years" REAL /* Performance for the last five years */,
  "ten_years" REAL /* Performance for the last ten years */,
  "life_of_subaccount" REAL /* Performance for the life of the subaccount */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date for the performance metric with the benefit */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date for the performance metric with the benefit */,
  "benchmark_performance" REAL /* The performance of the benchmark for the same period */,
  "alpha" REAL /* The alpha value, indicating the performance relative to the benchmark */,
  "beta" REAL /* The beta value, indicating the sensitivity to market movements */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* The Sharpe ratio, indicating the risk-adjusted return */,
  "treynor_ratio" REAL /* The Treynor ratio, indicating the excess return per unit of risk */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_benefits_subaccount_id FOREIGN KEY ("subaccount_id") REFERENCES subaccounts ("subaccount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_benefits_benefit_id FOREIGN KEY ("benefit_id") REFERENCES optional_benefits ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_benefits_performance_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_type_id") REFERENCES performance_types ("performance_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial advisor, portfolio manager, individual investor) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* The address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_subaccount_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "subaccount_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subaccount */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date for the access level */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date for the access level */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the access level (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subaccount_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subaccount_access_subaccount_id FOREIGN KEY ("subaccount_id") REFERENCES subaccounts ("subaccount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "subaccount_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subaccount the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* A summary of the report */,
  "report_generated_by" TEXT /* The name of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_generated_at" TEXT /* The location from which the report was generated */,
  "report_version" TEXT /* The version of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* The status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_subaccount_id FOREIGN KEY ("subaccount_id") REFERENCES subaccounts ("subaccount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "subaccount_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subaccount the action is related to */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., review, update) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the action */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* The status of the action (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "action_generated_by" TEXT /* The name of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_generated_at" TEXT /* The location from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_logs_subaccount_id FOREIGN KEY ("subaccount_id") REFERENCES subaccounts ("subaccount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Permission to view data */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Permission to edit data */,
  "can_generate_reports" INTEGER /* Permission to generate reports */,
  "can_manage_access" INTEGER /* Permission to manage user access */,
  "can_view_compliance_logs" INTEGER /* Permission to view compliance logs */,
  "can_generate_compliance_actions" INTEGER /* Permission to generate compliance actions */,
  "can_manage_benefits" INTEGER /* Permission to manage optional benefits */,
  "can_manage_subaccounts" INTEGER /* Permission to manage subaccounts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
